message:
feat(engine): add static semantics, TS module resolution, and RGC coordination modules

Add five new source modules:
- static_semantics: ES2020 early-error enforcement (TDZ, duplicate let/const
  bindings, const-without-init, import/export restrictions, scope resolution
  map building)
- ts_module_resolution: TypeScript module resolution parity contract
  (Node16/NodeNext/Bundler modes, specifier resolution, parity scoring vs tsc)
- rgc_execution_waves: multi-agent wave coordination protocol (wave mapping,
  file reservation, anti-stall escalation, handoff validation)
- wave_handoff_contract: wave-level entry/exit and ownership handoff
  validation with fail-closed error codes
- rgc_test_harness: deterministic test harness utilities (fixture loading
  with path-traversal protection, artifact-triad emission, stable structured
  test events)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
